description: Following an interview panel, the recruiting coordinator needs to collect feedback from all interviewers.

nodes.task_description: Identify the candidate and the interviewers who participated in the panel.

expected_outcome.expected: Coordinator identifies the correct candidate and interviewers.

nodes.task_description: Check the ATS to see which interviewers have not yet submitted their feedback scorecard.

expected_outcome.expected: Coordinator finds that one of the three interviewers has not submitted feedback.

nodes.task_description: Send a reminder notification to the interviewer who has not submitted their feedback.

expected_outcome.expected: Coordinator sends a polite reminder email or system notification.
